LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT STEPHENS INSTITUTE DBA ACADEMY OF ART UNIVERSITY'S MOTION TO COMPEL ARBITRATION IS GRANTED. THIS CASE IS STAYED PENDING THE CONCLUSION OF ARBITRATION PROCEEDINGS BETWEEN THE PARTIES. THE PREVAILING PARTY SHALL SUBMIT A [PROPOSED] WRITTEN ORDER THAT TRACKS THE COURT'S RULING, VERBATIM AND THAT COMPLIES WITH CRC 3.1312. JUDGE: ANGELA BRADSTREET; CLERK: J. RIOS MERIDA; REPORTER: MARIA VISCIO, CSR NO. 12353, EMAIL: MVISCIO@SFTC.ORG. (D302)
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF AUG-22-2018 IS OFF CALENDAR. DISMISSAL ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

Off Calendar Aug-03-2018 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-06-2017 Continued To Apr-25-18 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Arbitration And To Stay All Proceedings
Off Calendar Aug-03-2017 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Attorney, Sean McHenry of the law offices of Minnis & Smallets LLP (415-551-0885) appears as counsel for plaintiff/opposing party

Attorney, Jennifer J. Walt of the law offices of Littler Mendelson, P.C. (415-677-3137) appears as counsel for defendant/moving party

The cause is argued and submitted by both sides as set forth in the transcript of the certified shorthand reporter.

The Court reads the ruling into the record with both sides present, as reflected in the transcript of the certified reporter and the .doc (Word) minutes of the court clerk.

Defendant Stephens Institute dba Academy of Art University's motion to compel arbitration is granted. This case is stayed pending the conclusion of arbitration proceedings between the parties.

The prevailing party shall submit a [proposed] written order that tracks the Court's ruling, verbatim and that complies with CRC 3.1312.

Judge: Angela Bradstreet; Clerk: J. Rios Merida; Reporter: Maria Viscio, CSR No. 12353, email: mviscio@sftc.org. (D302)
